data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-22T18:27 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content:
? skogtown-wisp-wisp-037x [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

CHILDREN
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-0z5n: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-krhd: Check for orphaned processes ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-nkg0: Decide: loop or hand off ● P2
  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-zt1g: Scan agent health ● P2

content.text:
All steps are already closed. Squashing this completed patrol and starting a fresh cycle.

```
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ✅ PATROL CYCLE COMPLETE (previous)
  All 4 steps already closed. Squashing and creating new patrol.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
```

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Patrol complete: all steps previously closed, squashing stale wisp"
input.description: Squash completed patrol wisp to digest

content.thinking:
The `bd show` command crashed with a Dolt segfault. This is a known issue with Dolt's embedded database. Let me try a different approach - check the wisp beads directory or use `bd list` to see what's available.

Let me check the current step of the new patrol and try to proceed. The `bd mol current` showed several completed patrols but didn't show the new one (vs6cf). Let me try again.
